sources.sql: 'SELECT a.id, a.company_name, a.company_sector, a.asset_type, a.exposure, a.market_value, a.evic_eur, a.scope1_tco2e, a.scope2_tco2e, a.scope3_tco2e, a.pcaf_dqs, a.attribution_factor, a.annual_revenue_eur, a.entity_lei, a.isin, a.sbti_aligned, a.net_zero_committed, a.transition_plan_status, a.pcaf_asset_class, p.name AS portfolio_name FROM assets_pg a JOIN portfolios_pg p ON p.id = a.portfolio_id…

sources.sql: "SELECT reporting_year, actual_value AS waci, glidepath_value AS glidepath, dqs_score FROM pcaf_time_series WHERE portfolio_id = %(pid)s AND metric_type = 'waci' AND sector = 'portfolio' ORDER BY reporting_year ASC LIMIT %(lim)s"
